subject: refactor(export): replace PDF quality toggles with split button dropdown
body:
Cleaner UX: main PDF download button on the left, chevron dropdown on
the right reveals Low/Standard/High quality options. Selecting an option
closes the dropdown. Less visual clutter than separate toggle buttons.

Tags: export, pdf, ui
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pdf-export
Semver: patch
